  "themes": [
    {"id": "T1", "bar_start": 1, "bar_end": 5, "description": "Primary theme in c# minor: sustained bass octaves with continuous triplet arpeggios in the middle voice; melody in upper voice; characteristic pp, senza sordini texture establishing the movement's nocturne-like character"},
    {"id": "T1a", "bar_start": 5, "bar_end": 9, "description": "Theme 1 variant with upper-voice melodic elaboration and added inner voice; tonicizes E major (relative major); emotional intensification through voice-leading"},
    {"id": "T2", "bar_start": 9, "bar_end": 14, "description": "Secondary lyrical theme in E major (III), characterized by expressive melodic line in upper voice over persistent triplet accompaniment; relative major contrast"},
    {"id": "Trans", "bar_start": 14, "bar_end": 23, "description": "Transitional passage through b minor, modulating back toward c# minor and then toward F# major; features rising sequential figures and increasing harmonic tension"},
    {"id": "Dev", "bar_start": 23, "bar_end": 42, "description": "Extended developmental section centered on F# major and G# minor; features sequential ascending melodic lines, climactic passage bars 32-37 with arpeggiated figuration, prolonged dominant pedal on G# preparing return"},
    {"id": "T1-rec", "bar_start": 42, "bar_end": 49, "description": "Recapitulation of primary theme in c# minor; faithful return of opening material with similar pp dynamic and triplet texture"},
    {"id": "T2-rec", "bar_start": 49, "bar_end": 59, "description": "Recapitulation of secondary theme now transposed to c# minor/F# major area; leads through chromatic inner voices toward coda"},
    {"id": "Coda", "bar_start": 59, "bar_end": 69, "description": "Coda in c# minor: reiterated i–V oscillations over pedal tone, arpeggiated scalar figures ascending and descending, concluding in plagal and authentic cadential gestures; final fermata chord on tonic"}
  ]
